meaning: adj.不受统治(或支配、控制)的,粗野的,放纵的,放肆的
examples: Ungoverned Somalia has few such projects.
This diagram also shows the ungoverned activity transition.
They seemed like ungoverned children inflamed with the fiercest passions of men.
It turned out that the city had been not so much ungovernable as ungoverned.
The main issue is whether the Internet, so far relatively ungoverned, should be regulated like radio and television.
